common.error_generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

error_boundary.title: Something went wrong
error_boundary.message: An unexpected error occurred. You can try again, and if the problem continues, restart the app.

not_found.title: Oops!
not_found.heading: This screen doesn't exist
not_found.subtitle: The page you're looking for can't be found.

delete.confirm_message: Your account will be scheduled for deletion. You can restore it by signing back in within 30 days.
delete.error: Could not delete your account. Please try again.

restore.title: Account deletion
restore.heading: Your account is scheduled for deletion
restore.body: This account will be permanently deleted on {{date}}. Restore it to keep your data, or sign out to let the deletion proceed.
restore.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

errors.reset_failed: Could not reset your password. Please try again.
errors.sign_in_failed: Could not sign in. Please try again.
errors.sign_up_failed: Could not create your account. Please try again.

forgot.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a code to reset your password.

legal.placeholder_notice: Placeholder — replace this with your actual policy before shipping.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: This is placeholder privacy policy text. It describes, in plain terms, how this app would handle your information once a real policy is in place.
privacy.collect: We may collect the information you provide and basic usage data needed to operate the app. Replace this section with the specific data your app actually collects.
privacy.use: Any information collected would be used only to run and improve the app, and would not be sold. Replace this with your real data-use and sharing practices.
privacy.contact: Questions about privacy can be directed to the app owner. Add your real contact details here before release.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: This is placeholder terms-of-service text. It outlines the basic agreement between you and the app owner once real terms are in place.
terms.use: You agree to use the app lawfully and not to misuse or disrupt it. Replace this section with your actual acceptable-use rules.
terms.liability: The app is provided "as is" without warranties, to the extent permitted by law. Replace this with your real liability and warranty terms.
terms.contact: Questions about these terms can be directed to the app owner. Add your real contact details here before release.

onboarding.title: Everything you need to ship your app
onboarding.subtitle: A production-ready foundation, so you can focus on what makes your app yours.
